Abilities

  • Close Quarters Specialist: If the bruiser makes an attack against a target they have initiated a subdual on, they gain the Reroll 1’s benefit on their attack test – reroll any dice that roll a 1, excluding their Crit Dice, and use the new result. ELVEN WETWORK SPECIALIST

Traits

  • Vision Enhancements: Flare Compensation, Low-
  • Light, Thermographic, Vision Magnification:
  • Mash the Trigger: The bruiser does not suffer recoil
  • penalties.:
  • Brawler: The bruiser gains 1 free hit on subdual tests.
  • Improved Crit: On all resistance tests, the dwarf
  • bruiser scores a critical hit with their Crit Dice on a 5:
  • or a 6.:
